mapper.select: SELECT log_id, trade_id, approval_node, approver_id, approver_name, approver_org, decision, decision_time, comment, before_status, after_status FROM fx_approval_log WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId} ORDER BY decision_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_approval_log (trade_id, approval_node, approver_id, approver_name, approver_org, decision, decision_time, comment, before_status, after_status) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{approvalNode}, #{approverId}, #{approverName}, #{approverOrg}, #{decision}, NOW(), #{comment}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus})
